about.title: Deep-Tech Pet Care Platform
about.context: Naïve Innova Co., Ltd. is the driving force behind the success of modern pet brands. We are a spin-off from the Faculty of Veterinary Science, Chulalongkorn University, translating university lab research into full-scale commercial production. Founded and led by Dr. Teerapong Yata, a nano-scientist with over 15 years of experience as a former researcher at the National Nanotechnology Center (NANOTEC), lecturer at Chula's Veterinary Faculty, and Assistant Dean for Innovation (CUVET Enterprise). He bridges the gap between nano-research labs and the real market, backed by numerous international patents and publications.
about.technologyDesc: Our factory is located in Chiang Rai, near unique high-quality herbal sources of northern Thailand like Chamomile, Mangosteen, and Turmeric from organic farming communities. We process these into 84nm Nano-Encapsulation and utilize EcoGuard Plus, a modern antimicrobial certified by the US FDA and European EFSA. Every formula is research-backed and proven effective against resistant bacteria like MRSP, Pseudomonas, E.coli, and Malassezia, with testing from Kasetsart University.
about.valueProp: When you manufacture with Naïve Innova, you get innovative products that stand out, are easy to market, difficult for competitors to replicate, and have research-backed claims. The result is products that sell well and keep customers coming back.
about.closing: This is our commitment to every brand that trusts us with their production.

product.footerTitle: Elevating Your Brand Beyond the Ordinary
product.footerDesc: We understand that SMEs don't just want to manufacture products; they want products that sell well, sell easily, and gain repeat customers. That's why we infuse innovation, research, and care into every bottle that leaves our factory, ensuring your brand stays ahead of the market.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.q1: 1. How is Naive Innova different from a typical OEM factory?
faq.a1:
Naive is not a typical OEM factory that just takes orders. We are a spin-off from the Faculty of Veterinary Science, Chulalongkorn University, with our own proprietary nanotechnology. Our formulas are tested on animals with research backing for every claim.

3 Key Differences: (1) R&D team capable of adjusting formulas in 5-7 days. (2) Proprietary EcoGuard Plus & Nano-Encapsulation tech. (3) Low MOQ starting at 100 units to support SMEs.
faq.q2: 2. What are Nano-Encapsulation and EcoGuard Plus technologies?
faq.a2:
Nano-Encapsulation wraps active ingredients in 84nm particles for deeper skin and fur penetration than standard formulas, allowing longer-lasting effects with less concentration.

EcoGuard Plus is a next-gen disinfectant from natural amino acids, FDA (USA) and EFSA (Europe) certified. It safely replaces Nano-Silver and Parabens, proven to inhibit drug-resistant bacteria like MRSP, E.coli, and Malassezia at very low concentrations.
faq.q3: 3. I want my own pet brand but don't know where to start?
faq.a3: Don't worry, we have a One-Stop Partner system. Process: (1) Vision Consultation (2) Choose from 50+ Nano Library formulas or custom adjustment (3) Prototype & Sample testing (4) Packaging design assistance (5) Mass production (15-20 days). You don't have to start from zero; we have a proven path.
faq.q4: 4. How much budget do I need to start a brand?
faq.a4:
Easier than you think — start with just thousands! We actively support SMEs. Starting price examples (100 units):
• Skin Gel 20ml. — starts at 1,300 THB
• Tear Stain Remover 30ml. — starts at 1,900 THB
• Fur Spray 30ml. — starts at 2,000 THB
• Treatment 50ml. — starts at 1,500 THB
• Bio Shampoo 100ml. — starts at 4,600 THB
Includes: Free Lot printing & Plastic sealing. (Excludes: Packaging, labels, VAT 7%, and shipping). Higher volumes = lower unit cost.
faq.q5: 5. What's the difference between OEM and ODM? Which one do you provide?
faq.a5:
OEM = You have the recipe; we manufacture it for you.
ODM = We conceive, design, and develop the recipe for you.
Naive offers both. Use our validated Nano Ingredient Library of 50+ formulas or let us develop a proprietary one for you. We can also 'Nano-upgrade' your existing traditional formulas for better performance.
faq.q6: 6. How long is the production lead time?
faq.a6:
• Rapid Prototype & Sample — 5-7 days
• Formula Customization — 7-14 days
• Mass Production — 15-20 business days
• Packaging Design — 7-10 days (concurrent)
Total timeline: ~30-45 days, significantly faster than the industry standard 60-90 days.
faq.q7: 7. If I already have my own formula, can Naive manufacture it?
faq.a7: Yes, our Pure OEM Service allows you to send formulas and raw materials; we manufacture to spec with full QA/QC. Special Case: We can help 'Nano-upgrade' your ingredients (like herbs or essential oils) to increase efficacy and shelf-life without losing your brand's unique identity.
faq.q8: 8. Is registration required? Does it take long?
faq.a8: No registration required! Produce with us and sell immediately. No waiting for documents or complex steps. If you have artwork, we can print it; if not, we offer affordable design services to help SMEs get to market faster.
faq.q9: 9. What are the payment and shipping terms?
faq.a9:
Payment: 50% deposit to start production, remaining 50% before delivery. Supports bank transfers and credit terms for regular clients.
Shipping: Nationwide via private logistics. 1-2 days in Bangkok, 2-4 days for other provinces.
faq.q10: 10. What kind of businesses is Naive suitable for?
faq.a10: We are your growth partner, whether you're a new brand owner, SME, Groomer, Pet Shop, Vet Clinic, or Influencer. No matter your stage, we are ready to walk with you — starting at just 100 units. Free consultation, no strings attached.

hero.title: Bio Shampoo
hero.desc: Natural-based cleaning shampoo for pets. Free from harsh chemicals, gentle on skin and fur. Suitable for all breeds of dogs and cats, including those with sensitive skin.

whyProduct.title: Why Bio Shampoo stands out in the market
whyProduct.subtitle: 4 Key selling points of this formula — perfect for your box design, marketing posts, or staff training.
whyProduct.f1Desc: Cleans thoroughly without damaging skin balance. Leaves fur soft, shiny, and easy to comb.
whyProduct.f2Desc: EcoGuard Plus safely inhibits bacteria, yeast, and fungi. Reduces odors from moisture and oil.
whyProduct.f3Desc: Safe for sensitive skin. Helps reduce recurring skin issues.
whyProduct.f4Desc: Chamomile + Lavender Oil provide a gentle, relaxing fragrance.

tech.title: Not Just a Basic Formula — It's Nano Innovation
tech.subtitle: All Naive Innova formulas utilize two core technologies developed with veterinary research partners and NANOTEC to elevate efficacy reaching clinical results.
tech.t1Desc: 84nm particles encapsulate active ingredients for deep penetration into pores and skin layers. Sequential release ensures 3-5 times longer efficacy than standard formulas.
tech.t2Desc: Next-gen antimicrobial. US FDA and European EFSA certified as Food-Grade — safe even when in contact with food. Inhibits >99.9% of bacteria and fungi without damaging skin balance.

ingredients.title: Full Transparency — No Secret Formulas
ingredients.subtitle: We believe in transparency — your customers should know exactly what's being used on their pets.
ingredients.i1Desc: Soothes itching and reduces skin inflammation.
ingredients.i2Desc: Soft relaxing scent with natural anti-bacterial properties.
ingredients.i3Desc: Inhibits bacteria, reduces skin infection risk, and controls odors.

labResults.title: Proven Performance, Not Just Claims

labResults.r1Result: EcoGuard Plus inhibits S. pseudintermedius (MRSP/MSSP), P. aeruginosa, E. coli at ≤0.0977% conc.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Quick answers for overview — find detailed answers on the home page.
faq.a1: Every formula starts at 100 units (except Custom Formula at 300 units due to development). We support SMEs with tiered pricing for higher volumes.
faq.q2: How long is the production time?
faq.a2: Ready formulas (11 items): 15-20 business days. Custom Formula: 45-60 days (including R&D + Prototype + Testing).
faq.q3: Does the listed price include VAT and shipping?
faq.a3: Listed price is for formula per liter/kg. Excludes 7% VAT, packaging, labels, and shipping. Consult our team for a free full quote.
faq.q4: Can you produce my existing formula?
faq.a4: Yes, we call this Pure OEM. Send us the formula/specs, and we can manufacture it. We can also provide a 'Nano-Upgrade' for your formula.
faq.a5: No. All our items are in the Cosmetic/Care category — sell immediately after production without waiting for documents.

brandingPage.heroTitle: 6 Simple Steps to Owning Your Pet Care Brand
brandingPage.heroSubtitle: From a seed of an idea to products on the shelf — we walk with you every step. With our R&D Nano-Tech, validated innovation, and ready-to-produce Chiang Rai facility.
brandingPage.stepsSubtitle: A One-Stop Partner system that transforms your ideas into a commercially viable, innovative brand.

coreTechs.philosophyQuote: "A good pet product must first be safe, and only then effective."

tech1.title: EcoGuard Plus™
tech1.content: A natural antimicrobial agent in nano form (Ethyl Lauroyl Arginate HCl). Inhibits bacteria, fungi, and yeast with Broad-spectrum activity. Non-drug resistant and biodegradable.

tech2.title: Nano Encapsulation Technology
tech2.content: A nano-scale delivery system with an average size of 84nm. Enhances skin penetration, provides Controlled Release, and extends action time.

tech3.title: Herbal Active Complex
tech3.content: Synergizes premium local Northern Thai herbs like Chamomile, Turmeric, Houttuynia, Mangosteen, Centella, and others. Upgraded via Nano-Encapsulation for maximum efficacy.

howItWorks.step1Desc: ELA nanoparticles effectively adhere to pet skin, active for over 24 hours.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Physical disruption mechanism without antibiotics, causing non-inducible resistance.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Does not accumulate in the environment, non-toxic to aquatic life — Green Chemistry.

nanotech.title: Nano Encapsulation
nanotech.subtitle: Delivers Active Ingredients to Cell Level
nanotech.desc: Encapsulating active ingredients in nano-size (84nm) helps them penetrate skin layers better, act more precisely, and remain highly stable compared to free compounds.
nanotech.sneddsText: (Self-Nano Emulsifying Drug Delivery System) — Used in oil shampoo and oil-based products to deliver natural oil deep into fur. Quick absorbing, non-sticky.

benefits.b1Desc: Nano size allows easy passage through Stratum Corneum down to Dermis.
benefits.b2Desc: Slow and steady release ensures long-lasting active effectiveness.
benefits.b3Desc: Protects active ingredients from light, heat, and oxidation, extending shelf life.
benefits.b4Desc: Encapsulating potentially irritating actives makes them gentler, ideal for sensitive skin.

herbalComplex.title: Herbal Active Complex
herbalComplex.subtitle: Premium Natural Herbs
herbalComplex.desc: We select premium concentrated herbal extracts from standardized organic farms, processed via Nano-Encapsulation to maximize absorption and effectiveness in all formulas.

herbs.chamomileDesc: Relieves itching and reduces skin inflammation. Soothes sensitive skin.
herbs.turmericDesc: Reduces fungal inflammation, relieves chronic itching, and contains high antioxidants.
herbs.centellaDesc: Stimulates collagen production and skin repair. Soothes and reduces redness.
herbs.mangosteenDesc: High in Xanthone, fights free radicals, reduces inflammation, and nourishes skin.
herbs.teaTreeDesc: Natural antifungal properties, synergizes with EcoGuard Plus in anti-fungal spray.
herbs.lavenderDesc: Relaxing aroma with mild antibacterial properties.
herbs.coffeeCherryDesc: High antioxidants from coffee cherry fruit. Nourishes skin and reduces signs of aging.
herbs.houttuyniaDesc: Inhibits bacterial and viral infections, reduces inflammation, and speeds up skin healing.

ingredientLibrary.title: Active Library Over
ingredientLibrary.desc: Select and blend according to your brand vision — our R&D team will design a custom formula that competitors cannot copy.
ingredientLibrary.customDesc: Our R&D team is ready to develop new formulas from scratch. From customer problems to fully validated solutions in our standardized lab.
